name: Branded Banishment
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>烙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>印</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>追</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>放</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
Target 1 "Despia" monster or 1 Level 8 or higher Fusion Monster in your GY; Special Summon it, then you can apply this effect.
● Fusion Summon 1 Level 8 or higher Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing Fusion Materials mentioned on it from either field.
You can only activate 1 "Branded Banishment" per turn.
eff:

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack
THE CHRONICLES DECK: The Fallen & The Virtuous (All-Foil Edition)

action: Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards on the opponent's field as Fusion Materials
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon
